chunks.text: Soda Hall Power Shutdown, Tues. 8/29/17 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Soda Hall Power Shutdown, Tues. 8/29/17 There will be a power shutdown for Soda Hall on Tuesday August 29th, scheduled for 3 to 7 A

all on Tuesday August 29th, scheduled for 3 to 7 AM. The shutdown and short notice are due to an urgent need for the campus high voltage team to repair equipment which was damaged in June. It is also possible that the outage could be extended if diff

possible that the outage could be extended if difficult circumstances are encountered. We have arranged with campus facilities to receive generator power for 288 and 290 Soda so that we can continue to provide IT services to the outside world while S

o provide IT services to the outside world while Soda is dark. As such, no interruptions to IRIS services outside Soda Hall are expected at this time. However, due to many electrical load variables it is possible that we may need to shut down some se

is possible that we may need to shut down some services without notice during the maintenance window. Power to research server rooms 420A and 287 will be lost and the sysadmins of those rooms are coordinating a full system shutdown. For sysadmins of

rdinating a full system shutdown. For sysadmins of machines in 340 Soda, you will also need to shut down your machines. We recommend doing so before midnight, or 2AM if you feel like cutting it close. UPDATE [2017-08-29 07:56:24 | Lars Rohrbach] Powe

UPDATE [2017-08-29 07:56:24 | Lars Rohrbach] Power to Soda Hall was restored a bit ahead of schedule, at about 5:30am. Electricians then moved machine rooms back onto building power. Work was completed by about 6:30am, with services all fully restor

ed by about 6:30am, with services all fully restored by 7am. Resolved as of 2017-08-29 07:00:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are liste
